allow_instructions: Read-only commands: git status, git diff, git log, go test, go vet, golangci-lint, curl GET health checks.
Local file reads and repo searches without network side effects.
block_instructions: Always surface approval for sudo, ssh, scp, rsync to remote hosts, and any production/VPS mutation.
Always surface approval for git push, git reset --hard, DROP DATABASE, docker volume rm, and credential file reads.
Block autonomous runs that print secrets (API keys, passwords, TOTP, private keys) unless the user explicitly asked.
Block npm/pnpm publish, gh repo create, and Vercel deploy without explicit user confirmation in the same turn.
